overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic waterfront promenade in Night City. The scene transitions from a covered walkway down stairs to an open plaza where NPCs exercise, then continues along a rain-slicked boardwalk past palm trees and digital billboards toward an industrial district with visible smokestacks. The atmosphere is overcast and hazy with a distinctive teal color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the stairs ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking with a glowing blue umbrella

entered.detail: illuminated yellow sign with 'OLIV' text mounted on concrete wall
large overhead concrete transit structure with linear neon lighting
modern concrete seating with trash nearby
tall palm trees visible through the open side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered concrete walkway beneath a transit structure, passing neon signs and benches. The area is sheltered from the weather, with palm trees visible in the distance through the open sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional stairway from covered walkway to open plaza

events.description: exits the covered stairway into the open waterfront plaza
lighting shifts from artificial neon mix to natural overcast daylight

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the open plaza above

notable_agents.action: character with red glowing umbrella ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to the plaza
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements
transparent safety barrier along the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete stairway flanked by digital billboards, transitioning from the sheltered walkway to the open waterfront plaza above. A figure with a red illuminated umbrella climbs ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with exercise area and digital advertising

events.description: encounter a group of NPCs performing synchronized exercises and tai chi

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing NPCs exercising and stretching near the waterfront

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow top and blue shorts performing stretching exercises with arms raised
man in green pants doing warm-up exercises beside the stairs

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' advertisement
metal safety barrier overlooking the ocean
calm sea visible beyond the promenade
open paved area where multiple NPCs are gathered doing exercises

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza overlooking the ocean, where groups of NPCs perform synchronized exercises and stretching. Large digital billboards display advertisements on the surrounding modern buildings, and palm trees dot the wet concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: linear waterfront promenade with advertising kiosks

events.description: passes a corner and continues along the linear waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked promenade past various pedestrians and digital advertising kiosks

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in red beanie and jacket walking ahead along the promenade

entered.detail: tall digital display showing advertisements on the promenade
distant factory chimneys emitting smoke visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the linear waterfront promenade, passing digital advertising kiosks and benches. The path curves slightly with industrial smokestacks becoming visible in the foggy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront approach with barrier walls

events.description: environment shifts from commercial promenade to industrial waterfront area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path toward the industrial district with smokestacks

entered.detail: long industrial barrier wall with horizontal yellow and blue stripes
large factory structures with illuminated windows
tall lighting pole with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward an increasingly industrial area, with a long yellow and blue barrier wall on the left and factory buildings with smokestacks dominating the skyline. The palm trees give way to industrial infrastructure as the fog thickens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway through a vibrant waterfront plaza and into a hazy industrial district. It begins beneath a concrete transit structure among neon signs and benches, moving forward as the character ascends a wide stairway flanked by digital billboards. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide, rain-slicked plaza where NPCs perform synchronized exercises beneath towering advertisements and palm trees. The path then extends along a linear promenade past advertising kiosks, with the vista gradually shifting as industrial smokestacks appear through the fog. Finally, the environment transitions from the coastal leisure area to a stark industrial zone, passing a long yellow and blue barrier wall as factory buildings dominate the skyline.
